data.title: Global Times: China sets 4.5-5% GDP growth target for 2026 while striving to achieve better results in practice
data.description: In Beijing on March 5, 2026, China announced its economic growth target for the year, aiming for a range of 4.5 percent to 5 percent. The Government Work Report presented to the top legislature emphasized aspirations for even stronger performance. This annual growth objective falls within the specified range for the country's economic advancement.
The Qatar Defence Ministry confirmed that a drone attack on the U.S. Al Udeid Air Base was successfully intercepted.
Spot gold climbs close to 1% to $5,125.84/oz amid safe-haven demand.
Israeli military: Broad-scale strikes underway on Iranian infrastructure in Tehran.
Hezbollah in Lebanon has urged Israeli residents living within 5 kilometers of the border to leave their towns.

data.title: Global Times: China's national legislature opens annual session with 15th Five-Year Plan draft outlined; expert says long-term planning brings stability and highlights institutional strengths
data.description: On March 5, 2026, the 4th session of the 14th National People's Congress (NPC), China's primary legislative body, commenced at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. Notable attendees included Xi Jinping and various Party and state officials.
Officials say Bangladesh is set to pay $28.28 and $23.08 per MMBtu for spot LNG cargoes due to the ongoing Middle East crisis.
According to Axios, the Iranian officers departing Beirut had been working as military advisors for Hezbollah.
Israeli official: Iranian officers leaving Beirut are Quds Force members – Axios.
According to Mehr, fighter jets were heard flying over western Tehran.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer to host 2026 Future Ready Lawyer webinar series exploring how AI is reshaping the legal profession
data.description: A global webinar series presented by Wolters Kluwer Legal & Regulatory will delve into the impact of AI on the legal sector, analyzing its influence on work processes, business structures, and the balance of power within the profession. This seven-part series is an extension of the anticipated release of the 2026 Future Ready Lawyer report on March 10, incorporating fresh perspectives from industry pioneers and influential figures at the forefront of innovation. The aim of the webinar series is to explore how AI is reshaping legal practices and to provide valuable insights for legal professionals.
The KOSPI Index in South Korea fell 3% amid market pressure.

data.title: Quipt Home Medical Receives Final Order Approving Arrangement
data.description: Quipt Home Medical Corp., a U.S.-based provider of home medical equipment specializing in respiratory care, has received the final order from the Supreme Court of British Columbia regarding a plan of arrangement. The arrangement, under the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia), will result in affiliates of Kingswood Capital Management, L.P. and Forager Capital Management, LLC acquiring all outstanding common shares of the company for US$3.65 per share. This final court approval, received on March 5, 2026, is the last step before the arrangement's expected completion by March 16, 2026. (Word count: 77)

data.title: Consolidated Lithium Metals releases details on $50 million private placement financing.
data.description: A recent report stated that the unemployment rate in the United States fell to 5.2% in the last month, marking a decrease from the previous rate of 5.4%. The economy added 235,000 jobs in various sectors, exceeding analysts' expectations. However, concerns about inflation persist as the consumer price index rose by 0.3% last month. This increase is pushing the annual inflation rate to 5.3%, the highest in 13 years. The Federal Reserve is closely monitoring these numbers as they consider their next steps regarding economic policies.
The yuan started trading at 6.9142 per dollar, compared with 6.9125 at the previous close.
